Perfect, all 8 changes are staged. Now let me create a commit message. Based on the memory context (observations #29238-#29249), this implementation:
- Implements intent-based context resolution for brain plugin
- Adds new /context endpoint for MCP
- Adds get_context tool as primary interface
- Simplifies CLAUDE.md by removing redundant content
- Adds PreToolUse hook integration via CLI

Let me write a clear commit message summarizing all this.

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Implement intent-based context resolution for brain plugin

Adds natural language intent-to-context routing that automatically determines
the appropriate context level (workspace/project/task) instead of requiring
agents to explicitly select tools. Includes new /context endpoint with semantic
search, refactored CLI hooks for SessionStart and PreToolUse, and new get_context
MCP tool as the primary interface. CLAUDE.md trimmed from 156 to 60 lines by
removing redundant tool descriptions and directory mapping instructions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
input.description: Create commit with intent-based context message
